heading: Joint breeders
label: 2423 Joint breeders
notes: Amendments1994—Subsec. (a). , substituted “one person (or the successor of the person)” for “one (or his successor)”.Pub. L. 103–349, § 13(g)(1)Subsec. (b). , substituted “the Secretary” for “he” before “may”.Pub. L. 103–349, § 13(g)(2)
Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective 180 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 103–349section 15 of Pub. L. 103–349section 2401 of this titleOct. 6, 1994
amendments: Amendments1994—Subsec. (a). , substituted “one person (or the successor of the person)” for “one (or his successor)”.Pub. L. 103–349, § 13(g)(1)Subsec. (b). , substituted “the Secretary” for “he” before “may”.Pub. L. 103–349, § 13(g)(2)
Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective 180 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 103–349section 15 of Pub. L. 103–349section 2401 of this titleOct. 6, 1994

children.label: a
children.text: When two or more persons are the breeders, one person (or the successor of the person) may apply, naming the others.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary, after such notice as the Secretary may prescribe, may issue a certificate of plant variety protection to the applicant and such of the other breeders (or their successors in interest) as may have subsequently joined in the application.
